name: chompixel
description: Chompixel — a chaotic pixel-art browser game: chop the field, survive zombie hordes and cowboy duels, then flip the whole world into first-person DOOM mode. Built in Phaser, no build step.
author: Bruno Rodriguez-Mendez <brubrurodriguez456@gmail.com>
